name: claw-pay
description: Autonomous x402 payments for OpenClaw agents — pay for AI services with USDC on Base L2. Facilitator: https://claw-pay.org · Info: https://clawpay.eu

walletPassword.description: Password to encrypt/decrypt the local USDC wallet. Store securely.

facilitatorUrl.description: claw-pay facilitator URL for x402 settlement.

maxAmountPerRequest.description: Maximum USDC the agent may pay per single request.
